headline: Ametek Inc. (AME) Reflects Mario Gabelli’s Decades-Long Bet on Industrial Technology Solutions
summary: Ametek Inc. (NYSE:AME) is one of the best stocks to buy according to billionaire Mario Gabelli. Ametek Inc. (NYSE:AME) is the 9th-largest holding in GAMCO Investors’ portfolio, valued at $124.6 million. However, the fund has trimmed its position by 15,890 shares, or nearly 3%, to 606,859 shares, representing 1.2% of the portfolio. As of December […]
